blog_title: Traveling to Mauritius: Beautiful Destinations Not to Miss
seo_title: Traveling to Mauritius: Beautiful Destinations Not to Miss
description: Discover the ultimate travel packing list for every adventure. Pack smart, light, and stress-free with essential tips .
body_content:
Published by travelxploria on Wed Jul 02 2025

Have you ever visited Mauritius? Often dubbed the jewel of the Indian Ocean, it is a stunning island nation with an impressive blend of breathtaking landscapes, pristine beaches, relaxation experiences, cultural activities and more. This beautiful destination has something for everyone. Are you planning a Mauritius Travel from Kolkata? Here are five beautiful destinations you absolutely cannot miss while on a trip to this tropical paradise.

Le Morne Brabant

A UNESCO World Heritage site, Le Morne Brabant is one of the most iconic landmarks in Mauritius. This majestic mountain rises dramatically from the sea and includes white sandy beaches and lush greenery. If you are an adventurous soul, hike to the summit for panoramic views of the surrounding lagoons and the sparkling ocean.

The Seven Colored Earths of Chamarel

Located in the village of Chamarel, the Seven Colored Earths is a natural phenomenon. This geological wonder features sand dunes that display seven distinct colors: red, brown, violet, blue, green, yellow, and purple, created by the weathering of basaltic rock. You will love to stroll through the area, take in the stunning views, and learn about the unique geological processes that created this phenomenon.


Île aux Cerfs

A trip to Mauritius would be incomplete without a visit to this idyllic island. You can spend your time lounging on the soft white sands, swimming in the turquoise lagoons, or participating in various water sports, including snorkeling, parasailing, and jet skiing. Do not miss the local golf course, designed by the legendary golfer Bernhard Langer, and loved by every golf enthusiast.

Port Louis

The capital city of Mauritius, Port Louis is a bustling hub of culture, history, and commerce. Its Central Market, Blue Penny Museum and UNESCO World Heritage site Aapravasi Ghat are places not to be missed. You can get an authentic Mauritian experience at these places with the best packages, available at a reasonable Mauritius travel from Kolkata price.

Black River Gorges National Park

Black River Gorges National Park is a paradise for nature lovers. This expansive park is home to lush forests, dramatic landscapes, and a rich variety of flora and fauna. You can go hiking and birdwatching here, and enjoy watching some of the rarest bird species, such as the Mauritius kestrel and the echo parakeet.

So pack your bags and get ready to discover the enchanting beauty of this tropical paradise! Your trip to Mauritius will undoubtedly be an unforgettable one.

It actually depends on your travel preferences, including the kind of accommodation, types of meals, transportation facilities, amenities during stay etc during your trip.

The total trip expenses depend on your travel preferences, including the Kolkata to Mauritius package of your choice as well as the flight and the airlines carrier that you opt for.

The fastest, easiest and best way is to catch a flight from India to Mauritius, available from most major cities like Kolkata.
